source_acquisition_options.name: User uploads raw 3_STAR source file
source_acquisition_options.description: User provides a raw file containing 3_STAR draws with draw number > 115000024.
source_acquisition_options.leading_zero_preservation: REQUIRED — 3_STAR results are 3-digit fixed-width; leading zeros (e.g. '007', '042') must be preserved as strings, not parsed as integers.
source_acquisition_options.next_phase_action: Validate file schema, draw range, leading-zero integrity, deduplication against DB before any ingestion planning.
source_acquisition_options.blocker: No file has been provided by user as of P103 decision date 2026-05-27.

source_acquisition_options.name: Add official 3_STAR API endpoint to fetcher
source_acquisition_options.description: Extend taiwan_lottery_fetcher.py SOURCE_CONFIG with a read-only 3_STAR endpoint to discover draws > 115000024.
source_acquisition_options.required_authorization: Explicit user authorization required before any code change to fetcher.
source_acquisition_options.discovery_mode: read_only — no DB writes in endpoint discovery phase
endpoint_discovery_constraints: result must be logged to outputs/ for review before ingestion planning
source_acquisition_options.next_phase_action: Add read-only 3_STAR SOURCE_CONFIG entry, test endpoint discovery, log candidate draws to outputs/ — no ingestion.
source_acquisition_options.blocker: User has not authorized fetcher endpoint addition as of P103 decision date 2026-05-27.

source_acquisition_options.name: Keep HOLD — no data source available
source_acquisition_options.description: Maintain current HOLD state. P100/P101/P102 remain HOLD. Pipeline monitoring only. No ingestion, no endpoint work, no strategy promotion.
source_acquisition_options.next_phase_action: Continue governance monitoring. Re-evaluate when user provides source or grants endpoint authorization.

decision_matrix_summary.option_a_blocker: No raw file provided by user
decision_matrix_summary.option_b_blocker: No explicit fetcher endpoint authorization from user
decision_matrix_summary.default_recommendation_reason: No source file and no endpoint authorization available. HOLD is the only authorized path.

p104_recommendation.if_option_a: P104_UPLOADED_SOURCE_VALIDATION — validate file schema, draw range, leading-zero integrity, deduplication before ingestion planning
p104_recommendation.if_option_b: P104_OFFICIAL_ENDPOINT_DISCOVERY — read-only endpoint discovery, log results, no ingestion
p104_recommendation.if_option_c: P104 NOT_YET_ELIGIBLE — monitoring only until source or authorization provided

p104_gate_reason: P104 requires user to choose Option A (provide raw file) or Option B (authorize fetcher endpoint). Option C keeps pipeline in HOLD.
